data.body:
STATUS / VALIDATION & REMAINING WORK TO FINALIZE (end of experiment+refinement session)

DESIGN STATE: converged. The authoritative criteria registry is in this epic's description (35 criteria: DET P1-P7,
Layer-2 F/E/G/A incl G6, overlays T1-T12, cross-cutting COH/BROAD) and as descriptors in
docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/criteria/criteria_v6.json (31 LLM descriptors; guard check_registry_coverage.py
passes). Defaults grounded by ~2,000 LLM runs (chunking/budget/model/tier; see docs/experiments/plan-review-*.md).
Decomposed into 9 child stories (this epic). The two earlier "open design questions" (blocking-on-claim;
signature-semantics) were SETTLED in the brainstorm (see the "Design decisions revisited" section) — do not reopen.

VALIDATION (round 5, gold set on real DSO plans, docs/experiments/plan-review-validation-scorecard.md): recall =
13/15 criteria catch their seeded defect, ZERO rubber-stamping; the new overlays (T10/T11/T12/T5d/T1) cleanly
PASS-not-applicable on 12 real plans (zero false-fire) and new judgment G6/COH/A1 never false-FAIL. ONE over-firer:
E5 testing (9/12) — confirms round-4. Codebase-grounded criteria hedge AMBIGUOUS without tools; agentic grounding
resolves them.

REMAINING WORK BEFORE FINALIZING THE CRITERIA SET:
1. RETUNE E5 (over-fires 9/12) — apply round-4 type-aware suppression (test-tasks) + raise its bar; re-measure.
2. ROUTE the codebase-grounded criteria (G6/T10/T11/T9/COH/A1/E4/G1G2) + T3 to the AGENT tier (where AMBIGUOUS
   resolves to a concrete verdict); single-turn is for the non-grounded judgment criteria.
3. RUN E4 — generalization on a NON-DSO corpus (rebar's own tickets / other styles). MUST-HAVE before claiming the
   defaults/routing generalize: all validation so far used DSO data, the same population the applies_at routing was
   tuned on. (Experiment plan: docs/experiments/plan-review-validation-experiment-plan.md, E2-E7.)
4. LIFT the prose binary sub-checks into the structured `checklist[]` descriptor field (registry + layer2 child).
5. HARDEN structured-output parsing (one T5d run returned an empty finding).

THEN: file the F1-F12 follow-on register as separate discovered_from-linked tickets; begin implementation per the
9 children (registry/orchestrator first — it's the dependency root).
